creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2010-09-09 09:56:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/yconalyzer       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Yconalyzer is a low-overhead pcap utility that provides a bird's eye
  view of traffic on a particular TCP port, displaying a distribution of
  duration, volume and throughput over all connections while being able
  to narrow down to a connection as well.
  
  WWW:    http://yconalyzer.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/150360
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2253    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/net/yconalyzer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/yconalyzer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net/yconalyzer/pkg-descr (new)
